_rationale: Both binaries currently drop the CLI `--stats` flag and emit no `stats` block (Go because its CLI never wired it; C++ deliberately sets show_stats=false in src/cli/commands.cpp:1239 to match Go). The HTTP /browse-file endpoint DOES emit stats when given show_stats=true — locked by ServerTest.BrowseFileWithStats. file_id is scanner-order divergent (see http/search rationale).

tiers._rationale_ignore: file.file_id is the internal numeric file handle; scanner-order divergent between ports (see http/search rationale). BASE_IGNORE_NON_DETERMINISM applies implicitly.
